llm.openrouter.api_key.desc:
Your OpenRouter API Key.
If you don't have one, please open https://openrouter.ai/workspaces/default/keys to create one.
llm.oai_compat.name: Your Provider's name
llm.oai_compat.name.desc:
The name of your provider.
You can enter what you want but no spaces in your string.
llm.oai_compat.display_name.desc: The name that will display on your application. If you don't know what this is, please leave it empty.
llm.oai_compat.base_url.desc:
The URL used to call the API.
If you don't have one, please head to your provider and ask for it.
llm.oai_compat.api_key.desc:
Your API Key.
If you don't have one, please go to your provider's API Key management page and create one.
